title: Delicate Floral Norwegian Avocado Salad
description: A bright, crunchy salad with creamy avocado, edible flowers, and a splash of aquavit, perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: Slice the avocado into thin wedges and set aside.
Crack the goat cheese into small cubes and place in a small bowl.
Wash the arugula and radish, then tear the arugula into bite‑sized pieces and slice the radish into thin rounds.
Toast the pine nuts in a dry pan over medium heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes, then let them cool.
Combine the arugula, radish, toasted pine nuts, and edible flowers in a shallow slate tile.
Add the avocado wedges and goat cheese cubes to the salad bed.
Sprinkle lemon zest over the top, then drizzle olive oil and a splash of aquavit evenly.
Season with sea salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
Gently toss the salad to blend all flavors while keeping the avocado intact.
Serve immediately on a chilled slate tile for an authentic Norwegian experience.
